"'''One Battle'''" was a short [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3]]'' featuring [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] in a battle.

==Plot summary==
On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Aridka]],<ref name="Star Wars: The Comics Companion">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> nine [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] are the remainder of their force. A weakening [[Force field/Legends|force field]] is all that protects them from an army of thousands of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. As the force field breaks, the droid army immediately marches in and demands surrender. The clones choose to go out fighting, and their resilience pays off when a smoking [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Republic gunship]] drops out of the air. Plo Koon jumps out, and although the clones cannot understand him, they comprehend enough to shoot a rope at a massive [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] weapon, providing a small bridge for the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Koon, effortlessly wielding his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]], quickly destroys the machine, and the remainder of the Separatist forces. As he leaves, he drops one last comment, which the clones understand: "One battle, one Jedi."

==Continuity==
Though the planet on which this story takes place was left unnamed in the comic, ''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' identified it as [[Aridka]] in [[2006]].
